item.title: How AI and Automation Are Reshaping Business Worth
item.description: Technology is ready to augment business valuations (once the data catches up).

item.title: What Lindsey Vonn’s Olympic Comeback Teaches About Facing Risk in Leadership
item.description: If you make the call, you carry the outcome.

item.title: Science Says Rich People Aren’t Inherently Smarter. Mark Cuban Agrees
item.description: IQ seems important, but the three things–all of which anyone can control–matter most.

item.title: The New AI Marketing Playbook: 5 Founder-Tested Tactics That Save Hours
item.description: How companies are using agents and other AI tools to stretch their work.

item.title: Why Holding Back Hurts Your Team — and How Smart Managers Build Trust That Drives Results
item.description: Transparency — even when it’s hard — is a hidden catalyst for team success.
